parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant PackageManager
participant ApplicationPackageManager
participant PackageManagerService
participant ActivityIntentResolver
participant IntentResolver

-> PackageManager : queryIntentActivities
PackageManager -> ApplicationPackageManager : queryIntentActivitiesAsUser
ApplicationPackageManager --> PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivities
PackageManagerService --> PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivitiesInternal
PackageManagerService -> ActivityIntentResolver : queryIntent
ActivityIntentResolver -> IntentResolver : queryIntent
@enduml
```
